waves.point_eqs_str: a['speed']=a['t3']; a['odd']=mod((a['sample']*512),2); a['dist']=(a['t2']-((a['sample']*a['t1'])*512)); a['r']=(1-a['sample']); a['g']=a['mid']; a['b']=a['sample']; a['angadd']=((Math.abs(equal(a['odd'], 1))>0.00001)?((a['value1']*20)):(0)); a['x']=(0.5+(a['dist']*Math.cos((a['speed']-a['angadd'])))); a['y']=(0.2+((a['dist']*Math.sin((a['speed']-a['angadd'])))*a['q8']));
